title: Getting Started
body: Set up your Budget Tracker account and create your first budget in a few minutes.

title: Connecting Your Bank with Plaid
body: Securely link your Chase account so transactions import automatically each day.

title: Creating a Monthly Budget
body: Set spending limits by category and track them as the month goes on.

title: Categorizing Transactions
body: How automatic categories work and how to recategorize a transaction by hand.

title: Splitting Expenses with Roommates
body: Split rent and shared bills and keep track of who owes what.

title: Exporting Your Data
body: Download your transactions and monthly summaries as a CSV file.

title: Reading Your Monthly Summary
body: Understand the monthly summary email and the spending charts on your dashboard.

title: Tracking Recurring Bills
body: Add subscriptions and recurring bills so nothing catches you by surprise.

title: Setting Up Spending Alerts
body: Get a notification when you are close to a category limit.

title: Using the Mobile App
body: Install the iOS or Android app and keep your budget synced on the go.

title: Security and Privacy
body: How your data is encrypted and how read-only Plaid access keeps your login safe.

title: Managing Your Account
body: Update your profile, email, and password from account settings.

title: Fixing a Failed Bank Sync
body: What to do when transactions stop importing and how to re-authenticate Plaid.

title: Merging Duplicate Transactions
body: Clean up duplicate transactions that can appear after a re-sync.

title: Setting Savings Goals
body: Create a savings goal and track your progress toward it over time.

title: Frequently Asked Questions
body: Answers to the questions alpha testers ask most often.

title: Sending Feedback
body: How to report a bug or request a feature from inside the app.

title: About the Alpha
body: What to expect during the Budget Tracker alpha and how updates roll out.

title: Keyboard Shortcuts
body: Speed up common tasks like adding a transaction with keyboard shortcuts.

title: Deleting Your Account
body: How to export your data first and then close your account for good.
